name: AfdxSetTokenReal
title: AfdxSetTokenReal
syntax: long AfdxSetTokenReal( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, float value );
description: This function sets the specified token‘s data as a float value.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of the message that has been created with AfdxInitPacket.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: This is the offset from the beginning of the token's data area. If this is 0, data is copied starting at byte 0 of the token's data area.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: The values 4 (32-bit float value) and 8 (64-bit float value) are allowed here. This is the length of the value to be copied to the token's data area.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
